comments.comment: System expansion required 3.o tonnes of additional ammonia charge.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Refrigeration system was increased in size; required 3.0 tonnes of additional ammonia refrigerant charge. 1.5 tonnes was lost over the previous three combined years (0.5 tonnes per year - estimated) as fugitive emissions due to purging air and gland losses on compressors.
